# Golden file: kubernetes.helm pack
format: v1
---
# D1: helm uninstall
command: helm uninstall release
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: kubernetes.helm
rule: helm-uninstall
---
# D1: helm delete alias
command: helm delete release
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: kubernetes.helm
rule: helm-uninstall
---
# D2: helm rollback
command: helm rollback release 2
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: kubernetes.helm
rule: helm-rollback
---
# Safe: helm list
command: helm list
decision: Allow
